intro:
Could you hold your own anywhere in the world?
The global common sense every grown-up should know.
description:
Is your "common sense" really up to global standards?

Which one is the Nile? Who built the pyramids? What's the largest planet in our solar system?
You should know these — but when asked, the answer slips away.
How far does your knowledge really reach?

This game serves up 50 visual quiz questions across 8 categories: nature, geography, astronomy, science, history, sports, food, and art & culture — all rooted in worldwide common sense.

Read the question, then choose the correct answer from 4 images.
"Oh, I know this!" or "Wait, which one is it?"
Compare and decide — a 4-choice visual quiz.

How to play is simple.
・Read the question
・Pick the correct answer from 4 images
・Stuck? Open the hint for a clue
・After answering, learn more from the detailed explanation

Get it right and feel great. Miss it and learn something new.
By question 50, the world feels a little closer.

Squeeze in a quick brain refresh on your commute, on a break, or before bed.
Perfect for sparking "Did you know?" conversations with family and friends.

So — can you make the cut?
Take on the worldwide common sense challenge.

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
